content.text: Research Paper Abstract: We present a novel approach to multi-modal learning that combines vision transformers with large language models. Our architecture, called ViLM-Bridge, achieves state-of-the-art results on 7 benchmark datasets including VQA v2.0, COCO Captioning, and Visual Entailment. The key innovation is a lightweight cross-attention bridge module that enables efficient information exchange between modalities without requiring end-to-end fine-tuning of the base models.
